title: What Is Sulforaphane? The Anti-Aging Compound That Activates Your Body's Defenses
seo_title: What Is Sulforaphane for Women Over 40?
meta_description: Sulforaphane from broccoli activates Nrf2, your body's master antioxidant switch. Learn what the research shows about sulforaphane for cellular protection and aging in women over 40.
tags: Longevity, Sulforaphane, Nrf2, Anti-Aging, Liver Health, Women Over 40
